entry.title: New: GREAT-11(25) Reso 25-218 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
RESOLUTION 25-218, AUTHORIZING THE DESIGNATION OF SPECIAL COUNSEL FROM THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI, OFFICE OF THE CORPORATION COUNSEL TO REPRESENT THE MAUI POLICE DEPARTMENT IN THE MATTER OF THE ARBITRATION BETWEEN STATE OF HAWAIʻI ORGANIZATION OF POLICE OFFICERS AND COUNTY OF MAUI POLICE DEPARTMENT, SHOPO CASE M-2022-021; IA/PSO IA 22-0011 (GREAT-11(25))

Government Relations, Ethics, and Transparency Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
